item.title: They’re truly is no winning so if you are going to have an informed important discussion about China and its position in the wor...
item.description:
They’re truly is no winning so if you are going to have an informed important discussion about China and its position in the world and it’s actions which not all of which I support, then you gotta start by undermining the obvious and entrenched propaganda against it#greenscreenvideo

item.title: It’s so interesting how open and obvious the neoimperialism built into both of hese regimes is once a single second of criticism...
item.description:
It’s so interesting how open and obvious the neoimperialism built into both of hese regimes is once a single second of criticism is laid on them#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Also there are almost no civilian casualty in the Israeli side, this is madness
item.description:
Also there are almost no civilian casualty in the Israeli side, this is madness. It is extremely difficult to care about the exact violence that you’ve been supporting coming back in a tiny portion of its form#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Presenting as an equivalent solution to funding TSA sending in the group that has consistently had court orders finding that the...
item.description:
Presenting as an equivalent solution to funding TSA sending in the group that has consistently had court orders finding that they had a reckless negligent and violent disregard for any form of civil rights is normalisation#greenscreenvideo

item.title: An embassy that is illegal by the way because it recognises Israel’s incorrect and illegal claim to Jerusalem being the capital ...
item.description:
An embassy that is illegal by the way because it recognises Israel’s incorrect and illegal claim to Jerusalem being the capital of its settler colonial project
